name: lung screening CT — unrelated measurement does not satisfy nodule size

report.indication: Annual low-dose CT lung cancer screening.
report.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest.
report.findings: Solid pulmonary nodule in the right upper lobe. Stable 12 mm right adrenal adenoma.
report.impression: Right upper lobe solid pulmonary nodule. Lung-RADS: 4A.
